steps.action: Login as validation.admin@example.com with company MOCK

steps.expected: Roles page renders with restriction message, no Create Role button
steps.observed: Roles page shows 5 roles in a DataTable. No Create Role button exists. Informational message displayed: 'Role creation is managed by platform administrators. Contact your platform team to add new roles.'

steps.expected: Create Role button disabled or hidden with informational message
steps.observed: No Create Role button present. Clear informational message with icon explaining that role creation is managed by platform administrators.

evidence.consoleErrors: React key prop warning in DataTable (non-blocking)
evidence.network: No API errors on roles page load

assertions.title: Audit Trail Lists Business Events

steps.expected: Audit trail page loads with business events
steps.observed: Page loads with Business Events tab selected, actor filter, refresh button. Shows error state: 'Audit Service Unavailable — The audit trail service is experiencing issues on the backend. Please try again later or contact your system administrator.'
GET /api/v1/audit/business-events?page=0&size=20 returns HTTP 500: {"title":"Internal Server Error","detail":"Failed to write request"}
Retry button works, re-triggers API call, same 500 error persists
Frontend shows clean error state with icon, descriptive message, and Try again button. No crash or blank page.

assertions.issues: Backend GET /api/v1/audit/business-events returns 500 with 'Failed to write request'. Frontend handles gracefully with error UI and retry button. Blocked on backend fix.

assertions.title: Tenant Runtime View Shows Active Tenants

steps.expected: Tenant runtime page with active tenants and resource usage
steps.observed: Page loads with two sections: Runtime Metrics (shows error 'Failed to load runtime metrics' with Retry button) and Security Policy (renders correctly with session timeout, password policy, login attempts, complexity, MFA settings)
GET /api/v1/admin/tenant-runtime/metrics returns HTTP 404: {"title":"Not Found","detail":"No static resource api/v1/admin/tenant-runtime/metrics."}

Security Policy section renders correctly with: Session Timeout 60 min, Password Min Length 10, Max Login Attempts 5, Password Complexity: Uppercase/Numbers/Symbols, MFA Required: Disabled. Shows informational note that policy is managed by platform administrators.

assertions.issues: Backend endpoint /api/v1/admin/tenant-runtime/metrics returns 404. Frontend handles gracefully — Runtime Metrics section shows error with retry, Security Policy section renders correctly. Blocked on backend endpoint implementation.

steps.expected: Operational metrics dashboard with KPIs (revenue, SLA compliance, coverage), data from backend
steps.observed: Page renders as an operational metrics dashboard with: Revenue run rate ₹1180.00 (Last 30d: ₹0.00), Fulfilment SLA 0.0% (Awaiting fulfilment data), Dealer coverage 3 (Connected dealer entities). Also includes Order Pipeline section and Workforce Pulse section. Quick Actions buttons present.

GET /api/v1/portal/dashboard returns 200 with {"success":true,"data":{"highlights":[{"label":"Revenue run rate","value":"₹1180.00"},{"label":"Fulfilment SLA","value":"0.0%"},{"label":"Dealer coverage","value":"3"}]}}

steps.expected: KPI cards show real data values
steps.observed: Three KPI cards render with values matching backend data: Revenue ₹1180.00, SLA 0.0%, Dealer Coverage 3

evidence.network: GET /api/v1/portal/dashboard -> 200 with KPI data (revenue, SLA, coverage)

blockers.description: Backend GET /api/v1/audit/business-events returns HTTP 500 with 'Failed to write request'. Prevents testing business events listing in audit trail.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Clicked Try again button, re-tried API call via curl — still returns 500

blockers.description: Backend GET /api/v1/admin/tenant-runtime/metrics returns HTTP 404 'No static resource'. The endpoint does not exist on the backend.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Clicked Retry button on page, retried via curl — still returns 404

summary: Tested 4 assertions (Round 2 re-run): 2 passed (VAL-ADMIN-010, VAL-ADMIN-029), 2 blocked by backend failures (VAL-ADMIN-026: audit endpoint returns 500, VAL-ADMIN-028: runtime metrics endpoint returns 404). Frontend handles both backend failures gracefully with error UI and retry options.
